message:
test(ffs-block): make p99 latency check advisory-only across hardware

Absolute latency timings are not deterministic across different machines.
Demote the hard failure threshold to a warning so CI never fails on latency
alone; hit-rate checks remain the deterministic regression gate. Reverts
the Contabo-specific baseline back to the original 10.4us reference value.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
